name: Liars UNO
description: Liars UNO is the bluffing twist on Mattel's family classic — players play their cards face-down and call out which card they're playing, but rivals can challenge the claim. Get caught lying and you eat penalty cards; let a true claim slide and your opponent inches toward zero. Classic UNO color-and-number play with poker-faced sleight of hand layered on top.
